primitives.name: Crosswalk daylighting
primitives.description: Reclaim curb space near crossings to improve sight lines and shorten pedestrian exposure.
primitives.geometry_rule: Line-based crossing anchor with curb-corner polygon buffers.
primitives.accessibility_text: Shortens crossing distance and improves visibility for walkers and wheelchair users.

primitives.name: Bus shelter upgrade
primitives.description: Adds shelter, lighting, and seating to an existing bus stop node.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point anchor snapped to transit stop with optional setback polygon.
primitives.accessibility_text: Provides sheltered waiting space and seating close to the curb.

primitives.name: Protected bike segment
primitives.description: Creates a buffered bike segment along a corridor with bollard spacing guidance.
primitives.geometry_rule: Line segment with directional offset and regular protection markers.
primitives.accessibility_text: Clarifies bike travel space and reduces unexpected vehicle encroachment.

primitives.name: Corner ramp repair
primitives.description: Targets ADA ramp repairs with tactile warning and slope checks.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point or small polygon at intersection corner with repair extent.
primitives.accessibility_text: Improves wheelchair and stroller access at an intersection corner.

primitives.name: Traffic calming chicane
primitives.description: Introduces alternating curb extensions to slow vehicles on a local street.
primitives.geometry_rule: Alternating polygon protrusions along a street centerline.
primitives.accessibility_text: Slows turning and through vehicles while preserving emergency access.

primitives.name: School slow zone
primitives.description: Packages beacon, signage, and paint treatment around a school frontage.
primitives.geometry_rule: Corridor buffer centered on school frontage line.
primitives.accessibility_text: Signals a slower and more predictable school arrival environment.

primitives.name: Stormwater bioswale
primitives.description: Captures runoff along a curb edge or parcel frontage with planted filtration.
primitives.geometry_rule: Linear polygon inset along curb or parcel frontage.
primitives.accessibility_text: Uses curb breaks and planting areas while keeping a clear walking edge.

primitives.name: Lead service line cluster
primitives.description: Groups adjacent service replacements into a reviewable construction package.
primitives.geometry_rule: Line collection snapped to service connections within a block.
primitives.accessibility_text: Bundles street and service work to reduce repeated disruption.

primitives.name: Vacant lot garden
primitives.description: Turns a maintained vacant lot into a food or pollinator garden with public stewardship.
primitives.geometry_rule: Parcel polygon with interior planting beds and access path.
primitives.accessibility_text: Keeps a clear entry path and seating edge while supporting stewardship.

primitives.name: Play street kit
primitives.description: Temporary closure kit for recurring neighborhood play streets and small events.
primitives.geometry_rule: Street segment with closure nodes and activity zones.
primitives.accessibility_text: Uses removable barriers with accessible crossing openings and seating zones.

primitives.name: Cooling canopy pair
primitives.description: Pairs shade tree plantings with seating or waiting areas.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point anchors with canopy circles and shade overlap target.
primitives.accessibility_text: Improves thermal comfort where people wait or gather.

primitives.name: Vacant building wrap
primitives.description: Secure wrap and interpretive surface for a landmark building awaiting restoration.
primitives.geometry_rule: Building footprint with facade annotation surfaces.
primitives.accessibility_text: Keeps safety perimeter clear while providing legible historical context.

primitives.name: Ghost building outline
primitives.description: A lightweight historical-memory primitive for vanished buildings or lost blocks.
primitives.geometry_rule: Historical building footprint with low-opacity extrusion or outline.
primitives.accessibility_text: Shows a remembered building without implying present-day occupancy or access.

primitives.name: Food truck court
primitives.description: Configures a temporary curb or lot-based public market space.
primitives.geometry_rule: Polygon with service edge, queue zone, and seating field.
primitives.accessibility_text: Requires aisle widths and wheelchair seating clearances.

primitives.name: Library learning yard
primitives.description: Outdoor learning and reading area adjacent to a library or school.
primitives.geometry_rule: Polygon courtyard with entry path and seating clusters.
primitives.accessibility_text: Keeps circulation routes level and accessible with distributed shade.

primitives.name: Neighborhood wayfinding
primitives.description: Installs a shared wayfinding kit for neighborhood identity and civic destinations.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point anchors along a walking route or node sequence.
primitives.accessibility_text: Uses high-contrast legible text and accessible mounting heights.

primitives.name: Street light cluster
primitives.description: Targets a block face or corridor for lighting improvements tied to public routes.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point sequence along a line segment with spacing targets.
primitives.accessibility_text: Improves nighttime route legibility without relying on glare-heavy fixtures.

primitives.name: Community notice wall
primitives.description: Creates a physical and digital notice anchor for neighborhood updates and events.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point anchor with small wall or kiosk footprint.
primitives.accessibility_text: Supports seated and standing readers with clear contrast and reach ranges.

primitives.name: Storm shelter node
primitives.description: Marks a reviewed cooling or storm refuge location with access metadata.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point anchor tied to a civic building or campus entry.
primitives.accessibility_text: Highlights accessible refuge entry and hours of operation.

primitives.name: River trail overlook
primitives.description: Creates a small overlook or rest node along a river or creek-adjacent path.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point or polygon anchored to trail edge with seating arc.
primitives.accessibility_text: Requires turning radius, resting surface, and barrier edge where needed.

primitives.name: Market corridor banner kit
primitives.description: Adds repeatable identity, lighting hooks, and event banners to a corridor.
primitives.geometry_rule: Point sequence aligned to poles or facade anchors.
primitives.accessibility_text: Adds identity cues without blocking sidewalks or sight lines.

primitives.name: Repair cafe pavilion
primitives.description: Temporary or semi-permanent pavilion for repair events and tool sharing.
primitives.geometry_rule: Polygon event footprint with optional canopy volume.
primitives.accessibility_text: Maintains clear circulation aisles and seated work positions.
